title: What an American thinks about Kosovo

transcript.text: What an american thinks about kosovo I could have sworn I did this video

With a couple little hills and then um to go into the city it was really

And lots of traffic lots of uh construction going on I think it seemed pretty clear to me
That they were rebuilding from the war that they had and when I was riding down south from the city

Like how much it could sustain for a tank and how much it could sustain for a for a truck
